test.query: SELECT count() FROM (SELECT RegionID FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 40000000) WHERE NOT ignore(countDigits(RegionID))
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT AdvEngineID FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 40000000) WHERE NOT ignore(countDigits(AdvEngineID))
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT ClientIP FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 40000000) WHERE NOT ignore(countDigits(ClientIP))
SELECT count() FROM (SELECT WatchID FROM hits_100m_single LIMIT 40000000) WHERE NOT ignore(countDigits(WatchID))
